title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi 4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, generate, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama LLM, embeddings and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now named Open WebUI); runs in Docker, offers multi-user, RAG, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with async, streaming, embeddings and tool-calling support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; generate, chat, embed, list, pull models with idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-powered interactive CLI for Ollama with readline, themes, and conversation history.

title: Ollama Sharp
summary: .NET/C# client for Ollama supporting chat, generate, embeddings and streaming via IAsyncEnumerable.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s UI for inline suggestions & chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (cuda/rocm/cpu) and compose examples maintained by Ollama team.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain in a single Docker Compose.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models and switch personalities on the fly.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama allowing reproducible installs on Linux/macOS with GPU acceleration flags.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-cdktf
summary: AWS CDK construct library to deploy Ollama on ECS/Fargate with GPU autoscaling and EFS model cache.
